name: Top 10 News (Today)
prompt: Provide the top 10 news for selected profile from today, including id,title,summary, url, origin and published date for each story. Show it as markdown table. Be STRICT and only provide from today and not older

name: Top 10 News (Weekly)
prompt: Provide the top 10 news for selected profile from last week, including id,title,summary, url, origin and published date for each story. Show it as markdown table. Be STRICT and only provide last 7 days and not older

name: Generate Tag Heat Map
prompt: Generate a heat map chart showing the frequency of different tags in the news articles related to this profile over the past week. Use the tool **query_news** to retrieve the necessary data.

name: Top 10 Negative News(Today)
prompt: Provide the top 10 negative news for selected profile from today, including id,title,summary, url, origin and published date for each story. Show it as markdown table. Be STRICT and only provide from today and not older

name: Top 10 Negative News(Weekly)
prompt: Provide the top 10 negative news for selected profile for last week, including id,title,summary, url, origin and published date for each story. Show it as markdown table. Be STRICT and only provide last 7 days and not older
